title: Better Fuzs' Sword Blocking Sounds 3.0
description:
Replaces original parry sounds from Fuz's Sword Blocking mod to immersive ones!
New parry sounds and compatibility with Epic Knights awaits you!
body:
# ⚔  **Better Fuzs' Sword Blocking mod parry sounds by Timothaty**
When I was playing with Fuzs' SB mod, I thought that it would be cool if I had changed the parry sounds to more immersive variants. So I've done it.
All new sounds had been taken from game called Chivalry 2.
You can listen to these sounds here:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/dNcJ2fcPaPU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
Resourcepack must work on every version of Minecraft that Fuzs' SB mod supports. 

# Future plans 💡
- ~~Add more sword blocking sounds~~ _Done_ ✅
- ~~Add compatibility between~~ [~~Fuzs'Sword Blocking mechanics mod~~](https://modrinth.com/mod/sword-blocking-mechanics) ~~and Magistu's~~ [~~Epic Knights mod~~](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-knights-shields-armor-and-weapons) _Done_ ✅
- Add compatibility between Epic Knights addons ❌

![Parried](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5746c78a65e7002fa5372d5c0e02173f1073872.jpeg)

My Discord server: [click!](https://discord.gg/53DH4f4K)
